forge-edits: {"darkstar":{"tagline":"The night bends to his will.","origin":"Former Division I athlete and physics prodigy. Survived a government black-site dark energy experiment that killed every other subject. He didn't form the Knights out of heroism — he formed them because the organization was still operating and no one was stopping them.","stats":{"Power":100,"Speed":97,"Tech":60,"Intellect":90,"Will":99},"powers":[{"name":"Dark Ki Projection","desc":"Concentrated void-violet energy blasts that crack the air on release."},{"name":"Shadow Threading","desc":"Dark energy tendrils for grappling, binding, and high-speed traversal."},{"name":"Gravity Surge","desc":"Overrides gravity — flight, aerial combat, concussive ground launches."},{"name":"Final Surge","desc":"Full aura release multiplying strength and speed. Visible cost when it fades."}],"nkAlignment":"base","teamRank":"leader","gender":"Male","age":"750","birthYear":"1276","race":{"main":"alien","sub":"auranthi"},"species":"Auranthi"},"phantom-edge":{"tagline":"Every battle is already solved before it starts.","origin":"Top engineering graduate who discovered his employer was a front for the same organization that experimented on Kareem. He walked into their server room alone, copied everything, burned the rest, and rebuilt his tech from scratch.","stats":{"Power":88,"Speed":100,"Tech":100,"Intellect":100,"Will":92},"powers":[{"name":"Chrono Blade","desc":"Vibranium-alloy energy sword that phases through non-organic matter. Trails teal afterimages."},{"name":"Adaptive Nanosuit","desc":"Reconfigures in real-time — absorbs damage, shifts to offense, deploys micro-drones mid-combat."},{"name":"Elastic Form","desc":"Limbs stretch, coil, and rebound for unpredictable strikes and instant distance closing."},{"name":"Battlefield IQ","desc":"Visor HUD analyzes enemy patterns in seconds and feeds tactical data to the whole team."}],"nkAlignment":"base","gender":"Male","age":"47","race":"black","species":"Human"},"chimera":{"tagline":"He rewrote the rules of his own biology.","origin":"A geneticist whose research was stolen and weaponized without his knowledge. He administered his own prototype to himself. The process was supposed to be reversible. Most of it was.","stats":{"Power":96,"Speed":94,"Tech":98,"Intellect":100,"Will":95},"powers":[{"name":"Live Gene-Shift","desc":"Rewrites his own DNA on the fly — bone plating, razor claws, enhanced senses on demand."},{"name":"Catalyst Spheres","desc":"Self-guided orbs that detonate, emit EMP bursts, or form reactive barriers."},{"name":"Precision Strike","desc":"Baseball-honed reflexes plus enhanced genetics — lethal throwing accuracy at any range."},{"name":"Beast Intellect","desc":"Monstrous physical form doesn't dull the mind. Processes combat and science simultaneously."}],"nkAlignment":"base","teamRank":"vanguard","gender":"Male","age":"50","birthYear":"1976","race":{"main":"mutate","sub":"a_gene_mutate"},"species":"A-Gene Mutate"},"paladin":{"tagline":"He doesn't have the most power. He has the most heart.","origin":"Born from a secretive, ancient program of Enhanced Humans, Mario Richardson was part of a batch engineered to surpass human limits, granting him the foundation for his unyielding will and unique connection to his teammates. Decades of covert research and selective enhancements shaped him into Bastion Prime, the anchor of the Nocturnal Knights' unbreakable unity. His power now a testament to his unwavering commitment to his people.","stats":{"Power":92,"Speed":85,"Tech":50,"Intellect":88,"Will":100},"powers":[{"name":"Resolve Shield","desc":"Nearly unbreakable energy barrier fueled by pure willpower. Glows brighter as odds stack higher."},{"name":"Rally Aura","desc":"Pulse that restores focus and stamina to downed teammates. The team fights harder near him."},{"name":"Last Stand Surge","desc":"Strength and durability spike dramatically when the mission is truly on the brink."},{"name":"Unbreakable Will","desc":"Immune to mental attacks, fear, and manipulation. His calm steadies everyone around him."}],"nkAlignment":"base","teamRank":"operative","gender":"Male","age":"48","birthYear":"1978","race":{"main":"human","sub":"enhanced_human"},"species":"Enhanced Human"},"char-1780517019181":{"heroName":"Onyx Jaguar","realName":"Mike Abacano","tagline":"Shadows hide my face, but the stars guide my justice","origin":"Born in 1865 to an Auranthi mother and a human father, Mike Abacano's early life was marked by tragedy when a catastrophic event rewrote his biology, infusing him with the solar-absorbing abilities of his mother's dead world. Haunted by the ghosts of his ancestors and driven by a desire for justice, he has spent over a century navigating the shadows, honing his powers and seeking redemption. As he walks, the weight of his hybrid heritage and the crushing loneliness of his immortal existence threaten to consume him, yet he perseveres, fueled by the echoes of a lost civilization. His journey has led him to the Crimson Brigade, where he fights to protect the innocent and unravel the mysteries of his own fractured identity.","stats":{"Power":75,"Speed":70,"Tech":60,"Intellect":80,"Will":85},"powers":[{"name":"Stellar Surge","desc":"When Onyx Jaguar unleashes his Stellar Surge, his body begins to shift and contort, as if the very fabric of reality is being reshaped by an unseen force. His muscles bulge and ripple, covered in a mesh of glowing, ethereal lines that pulse with a soft, #1D9E75 light, as if the starlight itself is coursing through his veins."},{"name":"Auranthi's Fury","desc":"As Onyx Jaguar taps into the fury of his Auranthi heritage, his eyes burn with an intense, #378ADD blue flame, illuminating the darkest recesses of the soul. His movements become a blur, a whirlwind of #00dde0-tinged energy that can shatter steel and splinter stone."},{"name":"Ghostlight Step","desc":"With a mere thought, Onyx Jaguar can teleport short distances, his body dissolving into a cloud of shimmering, #1D9E75 mist that coalesces anew at his destination. The air seems to ripple and distort around him, as if reality itself is being warped by his presence."},{"name":"Cosmic Sense","desc":"Onyx Jaguar's Cosmic Sense allows him to perceive the hidden patterns and connections that underlie the universe, granting him uncanny insight into the workings of the human heart. His gaze seems to bore into the very soul, illuminating the deepest secrets and desires of those around him, all through a lens of piercing, #378ADD blue light."}],"nkAlignment":"allied","teamRank":"leader","gender":"Male","age":"161","birthYear":"1865","race":{"main":"hybrid","sub1":{"main":"alien","sub":"auranthi"},"sub2":{"main":"mutate","sub":"accident_mutate"}},"species":"Hybrid (Auranthi · Accident Mutate)"}}
forge-teams: [{"id":"nocturnal-knights","name":"Nocturnal Knights","abbr":"NK","color":"#A32D2D","colorLight":"#A32D2DCC","type":"cosmic","nkAlignment":"base","isDefault":false,"description":"Dark urban anti-heroes operating in the shadows between crime and justice.","motto":"We are the dark between the lights.","origin":"Founded by Kareem Carter after surviving a government black-site experiment. The Knights exist because the organization responsible is still operating — and no legitimate hero was stopping them.","logoSeed":4},{"id":"team-1779426722159","name":"The Black Order","abbr":"TBO","color":"#A32D2D","colorLight":"#A32D2DCC","type":"global","nkAlignment":"allied","description":"A secretive coalition of international operatives, united to combat threats that transcend borders and governments.","motto":"Silence is strength","origin":"Founded by enigmatic strategist Rachel Kim in the aftermath of a global pandemic, The Black Order began as an elite cell responding to catastrophic events. As the world teetered on the brink of chaos, Kim forged an alliance with rogue agents and covert operatives from across the globe, pooling their unique skills to form a formidable counterweight against terrorism, corruption, and existential threats.","isDefault":false,"createdAt":1779426722159},{"id":"team-1779919573404","name":"Nocturnal Legacy","abbr":"NL","color":"#534AB7","colorLight":"#534AB7CC","type":"regional","nkAlignment":"allied","description":"Heirs to the shadows, defenders of their city's darkest corners.","motto":"Shadows are our legacy, vengeance is our duty.","origin":"Born from the losses and sacrifices of their parents, the children of Nocturnal Knights have grown up in the darkness. Tragedy and hardship forged them into a team, united by their desire for justice and haunted by the ghosts of their past.","logoSeed":3,"isDefault":false,"createdAt":1779919573404},{"id":"team-1779987238888","name":"Crimson Brigade","abbr":"CB","color":"#A32D2D","colorLight":"#A32D2DCC","type":"cosmic","nkAlignment":"allied","description":"A coalition of nocturnal vigilantes united against an impending cosmic threat.","motto":"Shadows unite, darkness prevails","origin":"Born from the ashes of personal tragedy and loss, the Crimson Brigade was forged when Mike Abacano's brother, a skilled astrologer, died on the eve of a catastrophic celestial event. Consumed by grief and anger, Mike turned to the stars for revenge, discovering an ancient artifact that amplified his own cosmic energies. Now, he leads the charge against the coming darkness alongside his fellow allies.","logoSeed":5,"isDefault":false,"createdAt":1779987238888}]
forge-rosters: {"team-1779919573404":[{"id":"char-1780014137601","teamId":"team-1779919573404","realName":"Joshua Carter","gender":"Male","age":"15","birthYear":"2011","race":{"main":"hybrid","sub1":{"main":"alien","sub":"auranthi"},"sub2":{"main":"human","sub":"human"}},"species":"Hybrid (Auranthi · Human)","color":"#A32D2D","colorLight":"#A32D2DCC","initials":"JC","number":"01","isCustom":true,"nkAlignment":"allied","teamRank":"leader","heroName":"ApexNull","tagline":"Fists aglow, darkness flees","role":"Protector · Vanguard","origin":"Born in 2011 to a human mother and Auranthi father, Joshua Carter's unique heritage as a hybrid of the solar-absorbing Auranthi and humans has gifted him with the ability to harness the power of the stars. The memories of his ancestors' lost civilization weigh heavily on him, fueling his determination to safeguard those he cares about. As a member of the Nocturnal Legacy, he fights to honor his dual heritage and the legacy of his people.","powers":[{"name":"Stellar Surge","desc":"Joshua's fists glow with a soft, ethereal light as he channels the energy of the stars, amplifying his physical strength"},{"name":"Auroral Shield","desc":"He summons a protective aura that shimmers like the aurora borealis, deflecting attacks and safeguarding his allies"},{"name":"Nova Strike","desc":"With a fierce cry, Joshua unleashes a concentrated blast of starlight-infused energy, obliterating his targets"},{"name":"Gravitic Anchor","desc":"He generates a localized gravity field, anchoring himself to the ground and allowing him to deliver devastating blows"}],"stats":{"Power":75,"Speed":70,"Tech":60,"Intellect":80,"Will":85},"costumeDesc":"ApexNull's costume is a sleek black and grey jumpsuit with #A32D2D accents, adorned with intricate, swirling patterns that evoke the celestial bodies he draws his power from. The suit is topped with a flowing cape, clasped at the shoulder with a stylized, star-shaped brooch.","powerFX":"As Joshua activates his powers, his body is surrounded by a soft, pulsing glow of #A32D2D light, which erupts into brilliant, starlike bursts when he unleashes his abilities. The air around him seems to shimmer and distort, as if the very fabric of reality is being warped by his energy.","consistencyNotes":"ApexNull's design should always incorporate elements of celestial bodies and the Auranthi's solar-absorbing biology. Face always visible — no helmet.","teamRank":"operative","age":"48","birthYear":"1978"}],"team-1779426722159":[{"id":"char-1780505553107","teamId":"team-1779426722159","realName":"Jonathan Lewis","gender":"Male","age":"106","birthYear":"1920","race":{"main":"alien","sub":"auranthi"},"species":"Auranthi","color":"#888780","colorPalette":["#888780","#4A3FA0","#BA7517"],"colorLight":"#888780CC","initials":"JL","number":"01","isCustom":true,"nkAlignment":"allied","teamRank":"leader","profileLore":25,"heroName":"Solaris","tagline":"Forged in the fire of stolen time, fueled by the pursuit of a protected future","role":"Truth-Teller · Guardian of Lost Potential","origin":"Jonathan Lewis, a 106-year-old Auranthi, carries the weight of his dead world's solar-absorbing legacy. His people's immense power, drawn from starlight, is a constant reminder of what was lost. Haunted by the ghosts of his civilization, he has dedicated his life to protecting the future, driven by the wound of stolen opportunity, identity, and time. As Solaris, he channels this pain into a fierce determination to safeguard the potential of those around him.","powers":[{"name":"Chrono-Acceleration","desc":"Solaris can accelerate his movements and reactions, allowing him to process and respond to situations at incredible speeds. This power is a direct result of his kinetic processing and movement-driven stress response."},{"name":"Stellar Absorption","desc":"Solaris can absorb and redirect starlight-based energy attacks, using his Auranthi physiology to amplify his physical abilities. This power is a manifestation of his people's solar-absorbing legacy."},{"name":"Protective Disruption","desc":"Solaris can generate a localized environmental disruption, creating a proximity effect that makes it difficult for enemies to approach him or his protected targets. This power is an externalization of his explosive directness and Straight-line force movement."},{"name":"Engineered Precision","desc":"Solaris can imbue his physical attacks with engineered precision, allowing him to strike with calculated efficiency and effectiveness. This power is a reflection of his technological and constructed approach to problem-solving."}],"stats":{"Power":75,"Speed":70,"Tech":60,"Intellect":80,"Will":85},"costumeDesc":"Solaris's costume is a metallic, dark gray (#888780) and dark blue (#4A3FA0) ensemble, with hints of golden orange (#BA7517) accents, evoking a sense of earned brightness and forged quality. The suit is designed for mobility and protection, with kinetic symbols etched into the armor, representing continuous motion and never being at rest.","powerFX":"Solaris's powers are accompanied by a distinctive visual signature: a metallic sheen, reminiscent of constructed technology, and a disruptive, starlight-infused aura that crackles with energy. When he uses his powers, the air around him seems to distort, as if reality itself is being engineered to his will. The colors #888780, #4A3FA0, and #BA7517 are woven throughout his power effects, creating a cohesive visual language that reflects his identity.","consistencyNotes":"Design decisions should prioritize Solaris's real emotional core, his Auranthi heritage, and his dedication to protecting the future. His visual identity, powers, and costume should reflect his kinetic, movement-driven approach to life, as well as his technological and constructed problem-solving skills.","dna":["Iroh (Avatar: The Last Airbender)","The Atom (DC Comics)"]}],"team-1779987238888":[{"id":"char-1780517019181","teamId":"team-1779987238888","realName":"Mike Abacano","gender":"Male","age":"161","birthYear":"1865","race":{"main":"hybrid","sub1":{"main":"alien","sub":"auranthi"},"sub2":{"main":"mutate","sub":"accident_mutate"}},"species":"Hybrid (Auranthi · Accident Mutate)","color":"#1D9E75","colorPalette":["#1D9E75","#378ADD","#00dde0"],"colorLight":"#1D9E75CC","initials":"MA","number":"01","isCustom":true,"nkAlignment":"allied","teamRank":"leader","deepLore":{"visualRef":"Batman, Stitch from lilo and stitch,","mustHave":"usually dressed in kevlar, combat pants and Nike Airmax 90s","universe":"marvel","keyInspo":"moonknight","heroArchetype":"antihero","secretID":"full","powerScale":"cosmic","powerCost":"nocost","build":"powerhouse","costume":"minimal","fxStyle":"bio","auraPresence":"authority","coreArc":"discovery","lineTheyWontCross":"noother","teamFunction":"heart","deepWant":"normal"},"heroName":"Onyx Jaguar","tagline":"Shadows hide my face, but the stars guide my justice","role":"Anti-Hero Vigilante · Guardian of Lost Souls","origin":"Born in 1865 to an Auranthi mother and a human father, Mike Abacano's early life was marked by tragedy when a catastrophic event rewrote his biology, infusing him with the solar-absorbing abilities of his mother's dead world. Haunted by the ghosts of his ancestors and driven by a desire for justice, he has spent over a century navigating the shadows, honing his powers and seeking redemption. As he walks, the weight of his hybrid heritage and the crushing loneliness of his immortal existence threaten to consume him, yet he perseveres, fueled by the echoes of a lost civilization. His journey has led him to the Crimson Brigade, where he fights to protect the innocent and unravel the mysteries of his own fractured identity.","powers":[{"name":"Stellar Surge","desc":"When Onyx Jaguar unleashes his Stellar Surge, his body begins to shift and contort, as if the very fabric of reality is being reshaped by an unseen force. His muscles bulge and ripple, covered in a mesh of glowing, ethereal lines that pulse with a soft, #1D9E75 light, as if the starlight itself is coursing through his veins."},{"name":"Auranthi's Fury","desc":"As Onyx Jaguar taps into the fury of his Auranthi heritage, his eyes burn with an intense, #378ADD blue flame, illuminating the darkest recesses of the soul. His movements become a blur, a whirlwind of #00dde0-tinged energy that can shatter steel and splinter stone."},{"name":"Ghostlight Step","desc":"With a mere thought, Onyx Jaguar can teleport short distances, his body dissolving into a cloud of shimmering, #1D9E75 mist that coalesces anew at his destination. The air seems to ripple and distort around him, as if reality itself is being warped by his presence."},{"name":"Cosmic Sense","desc":"Onyx Jaguar's Cosmic Sense allows him to perceive the hidden patterns and connections that underlie the universe, granting him uncanny insight into the workings of the human heart. His gaze seems to bore into the very soul, illuminating the deepest secrets and desires of those around him, all through a lens of piercing, #378ADD blue light."}],"stats":{"Power":75,"Speed":70,"Tech":60,"Intellect":80,"Will":85},"costumeDesc":"Onyx Jaguar's costume is a utilitarian blend of #1D9E75 kevlar and #378ADD-tinted combat pants, topped with a pair of scuffed, #00dde0-laced Nike Airmax 90s. The only decorative element is a small, #1D9E75 gemstone set into the chest plate, a token of his Auranthi heritage that glows with a soft, otherworldly light. The overall design is minimal and practical, eschewing flashy logos or elaborate designs in favor of a rugged, no-nonsense aesthetic that reflects his Anti-Hero Vigilante persona.","powerFX":"When Onyx Jaguar's powers are active, his body is surrounded by a halo of #1D9E75 light, as if the starlight itself is being channeled through his very being. The air around him seems to distort and ripple, filled with shimmering, #00dde0 threads that weave together into a tapestry of pure energy. As he moves, the #378ADD blue flames that dance in his eyes cast flickering shadows across the surrounding environment, imbuing the scene with an otherworldly, mystical atmosphere.","consistencyNotes":"Onyx Jaguar's design should always incorporate a blend of #1D9E75, #378ADD, and #00dde0, reflecting his Auranthi heritage and connection to the stars. His costumes and power effects should be grounded in a sense of gritty, real-world practicality, even as they tap into the mystical, otherworldly aspects of his personality. Whenever possible, his visuals should evoke a sense of darkness, shadow, and mystery, as if the very presence of Onyx Jaguar is enough to draw the light out of the room.","dna":["Moon Knight","Batman"]}]}
